## Goal
Tables module + server-side QR code generation for each table.

## Endpoints
- `GET /api/tables` — manager only, list all tables with zone info
- `POST /api/tables` — manager only, create a new table
- `DELETE /api/tables/:id` — manager only
- `GET /api/tables/:id/qr` — manager only, returns a PNG QR code for the table

## QR Code URL Format
The QR encodes: `<FRONTEND_URL>/table/:tableId?t=<hmac_token>`

The HMAC token is generated by `TableTokenService` (already built in auth module). This prevents customers from manually changing the table number in the URL.

## Rules
- QR codes are generated server-side using the `qrcode` npm package
- The token is static per table (does not expire in v0.9)
- Table numbers must be unique per restaurant

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Manager can create tables and assign zones
- [ ] QR PNG downloads correctly and encodes the signed URL
- [ ] Scanning QR → customer page → token verified by `GET /api/auth/table/:id/verify`
